markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, technical audit status, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Blog sessions grew 300% (5 → \~20) in one month, with every published article receiving traffic, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Publishing:** To maintain momentum, 3 approved articles will publish immediately; 3 needing Jen's review will be batched with next week's 5 for an 8-article push.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Technical Audit:** Progress is blocked by a firewall, but Rimkus is transitioning web agencies and plans to remove the international plugin, simplifying the audit's scope.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Rimkus will identify seasonal/trending topics (e.g., year-end code compliance) for reactive content to capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [**Blog Traffic:** Organic sessions grew 300% (5 → \~20) from October to November.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Content Engagement:** Every published article (28 total) has received at least one session, validating the content's value.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Top Cohort:** Structural Engineering is the highest-performing topic, likely due to seasonal search interest in year-end code compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**Actionable Insight:** This suggests an opportunity for reactive content on timely topics (e.g., new legislation, high-profile news) to capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)

### Editorial & Content Strategy

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The goal is a consistent weekly cadence (5 articles/week) to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**This Week:** 3 approved articles will publish immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Next Week:** 3 articles awaiting Jen's review will be batched with 5 new ones for an 8-article push.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Content Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**New Topics:** 40 Forensic-related titles are in Airtable for Jen's review.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** 31 articles flagged for refresh are in the Airtable roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
      - [**Pruning:** The list of URLs to remove is in Notion, pending Rimkus's action.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [**Formatting Fix:** WordPress doesn't support Google Docs checkboxes.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Checklists will use bullets.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** GrowthX will seek a plugin to restore checkbox functionality.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### Technical Audit & Agency Transition

  - [**Status:** The audit is blocked by a firewall, preventing the final crawl. Jacob is working with Rimkus's web team to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Agency Transition:** Rimkus is moving to a new web agency.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**Timing:** Notice to the current agency is planned for early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**Impact:** This transition may cause temporary delays.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Plugin Removal:** Rimkus plans to remove the international translation plugin due to ongoing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Priority Shift:** This makes international folder structure a lower audit priority, allowing focus on other high-value items like legacy site versions.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Logistics & Communication

  - [**Slack Access:** Alishia is locked out of the shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** This may be a limitation of Rimkus's free Slack plan, which could restrict external channels.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew will investigate with GrowthX IT; Alishia will also check internally.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [**Content Guidelines:** Alishia will follow up on a past request to merge Rimkus's updated voice guidelines into GrowthX's master document.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
      - [Investigate and resolve Alishia's Slack access issue.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
      - [Publish 3 approved articles immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new articles to Rimkus by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [Confirm if Rimkus's updated voice guidelines were integrated; share the link.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)
      - [Discuss adding reactive content to the strategy with the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Alishia:**](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
      - [Investigate the Slack plan issue internally.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
      - [Task the web team with pruning the list of URLs from Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
      - [Connect with Nora (SEO Manager) to identify seasonal/trending topics.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [**Jen:**](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Review 40 new Forensic-related titles in Airtable upon return from PTO.](https://fathom.video/share/MMBtVfZmiR2Fyb3yfkBUox212TjHixGL?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
